No history of head injury is mentioned, so it's unlikely to be something like a concussion or other traumatic brain injury.

Putting it all together, the main symptoms point towards delirium tremens.
The patient's recent cessation of alcohol use and the presence of hallucinations, disorientation, and confusion strongly suggest this diagnosis.
I don't see any other conditions that fit better here, like seizures or other withdrawal syndromes, because the symptoms are consistent with delirium tremens.
